languages.text: "И да очистится мир от ереси, закалится в священном пламени..."

languages.text: "May the world be cleansed of heresy, tempered in sacred flame..."

languages.text: "Möge die Welt von der Ketzerei gereinigt und in heiliger Flamme geläutert werden..."
languages.original_text: "May the world be cleansed of heresy, tempered in sacred flame..."

languages.text: "Que le monde soit purifié de l'hérésie, tempéré par la flamme sacrée..."
languages.original_text: "May the world be cleansed of heresy, tempered in sacred flame..."

languages.text: "愿世界荡涤异端，在圣火中锤炼......"
languages.original_text: "May the world be cleansed of heresy, tempered in sacred flame..."

languages.text: "Que el mundo sea limpiado de herejía, templado en la llama sagrada..."
languages.original_text: "May the world be cleansed of heresy, tempered in sacred flame..."

languages.text: "世界が異端から浄化され、聖なる炎に包まれますように..."
